raw_title: Propaganda during Economic Crises: Reference Point Adjustment in Economic News
title_en: Propaganda during Economic Crises: Reference Point Adjustment in Economic News
title_zh: 经济危机期间的宣传：经济新闻中的参考点调整
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨在经济危机期间，新闻媒体如何通过调整参考点来影响公众对经济状况的看法。它关注宣传策略在经济报道中的应用，以及这些策略如何塑造人们对经济现实的理解。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how news media influence public perceptions of economic conditions during crises by adjusting reference points. It focuses on propaganda strategies in economic reporting and how they shape understanding of economic realities.
research_direction_zh: 研究媒体在经济危机中的角色，特别是如何通过框架和参考点操纵来影响公众舆论和经济决策。
research_direction_en: Investigating the role of media during economic crises, particularly how framing and reference point manipulation influence public opinion and economic decision-making.
